subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the last [to believe]
subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the most resplendent glory of God, and upon thee be the most exalted majesty of God, and upon thee be the most beautiful grace of God [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. ان من بهاءالله علیک ابهاه و من جلال الله علیک اجله و من جمال الله علیک اجمله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
